params.insuranceController_: InsuranceController address (can be zero if disabled).

returns.liquidatable: True when maintenance margin is breached.

returns.breached: True if margin after unrealized PnL is below required maintenance margin.

onMarginUpdated(address,bytes32).details: Clears the grace window once the position is back above maintenance margin.

constructor.notice: Creates liquidation engine with protocol module dependencies.

getGracePeriodExpiry(address,bytes32).notice: Returns the stored grace period expiry for a user and market pair.

isLiquidatable(address,bytes32).notice: Checks whether a user position is currently liquidatable.

isMaintenanceBreached((uint256,address,b.notice: Computes whether maintenance margin requirement is breached for a position.

liquidate(address,bytes32).notice: Executes liquidation for a liquidatable position and settles insurance claim if applicable.

onMarginUpdated(address,bytes32).notice: Refreshes stored protection state after margin top-ups.
